name: Keep Alive (Request)
desc: Server sends a keep-alive ID that the client must echo back in C00PacketKeepAlive.

fields.name: id
fields.desc: Random keep-alive ID to echo back

implementation.overview: Server requests client to echo back a keepalive ID (int). Client must respond with C00PacketKeepAlive or timeout. Modules: PingSpoof (delay response), Disabler (cancel), Backtrack (buffer).
